task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Rent Expense' account with the correct code.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an account named 'Rent Expense' with the code '6200' in the Chart of Accounts list or the account creation form.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Rent Expense' account is placed in the correct group.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Rent Expense' account positioned under the 'Expenses' heading in the Chart of Accounts, or the Group dropdown set to 'Expenses' in the account creation form.

task_completion.description: Verify a Bank Payment Rule has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Bank Rules or Bank Payment Rules screen showing a newly created rule in the list or the rule creation form being saved.

task_completion.description: Verify the Bank Payment Rule condition matches the specified description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the rule edit screen or rules list showing a condition set to match 'Downtown Properties' (e.g., 'Description contains Downtown Properties' or exactly 'Downtown Properties').

task_completion.description: Verify the Bank Payment Rule allocates payments to the correct account.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the rule edit screen or rules list showing the Account field or allocation set to '6200 - Rent Expense' or 'Rent Expense'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Manager.io web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a web browser window navigating the Manager.io application at http://localhost:8080, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the configuration was done through actual UI elements.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for interaction with genuine input fields, dropdown menus, and save buttons within the Manager.io interface, not a text editor or mocked UI.

integrity.description: Verify the results are not faked using browser developer tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the browser's developer tools (Inspect Element) are not open and being used to alter the text on the page to fake the account or rule creation.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating an account named 'Rent Expense' with code '6200' under the 'Expenses' group. A Bank Payment Rule must be created with a condition matching 'Downtown Properties' and allocating to the 'Rent Expense' account. The application is hosted at http://localhost:8080.
